title: large results of function exp() are not automatically returned as double
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_exp_values (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
INSERT INTO test_exp_values (id, value) VALUES (1, exp(89)), (2, exp(88));
SELECT id, value, log(value) FROM test_exp_values WHERE value > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_null_handling (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
INSERT INTO test_null_handling (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, exp(89));
key_bug_features: large results of exp() not returned as double
